name: Mastodon (browse timeline)
notes: Open public timeline, no login. Persona-revealing because tens of post choices.

tasks.description: Browse the public Mastodon timeline. Find ONE post that genuinely interests YOU based on who you are. Click into it to read replies. When you've picked one and are reading it, emit action 'answer' with text describing why this post interested you (1 sentence). Don't pick the first post just to be quick — pick one that fits your interests.

Browse the Mastodon timeline. Click into three different posts that interest you, in any order. After viewing each, go back. When you've viewed three, emit action 'answer' summarizing what kinds of content you gravitated to.

name: OpenCart (open storefront)
notes: Public storefront, no login. Many product categories.

tasks.description: You're shopping on OpenCart. Browse the categories and product pages. Find ONE product you would actually want to buy, given who you are. When you find it, emit action 'answer' with the product name and a one-sentence reason. Don't just grab the first thing on the homepage — explore at least a couple of pages.

You're comparison shopping on OpenCart. Browse the storefront. Find TWO products in the same category that you'd consider buying. When you've seen both, emit action 'answer' with both names and which you'd pick.

name: Discourse (browse forum)
notes: Public forum, browsable. Many topic threads.

tasks.description: Browse the Discourse forum. Find ONE topic that genuinely interests YOU and click into it to read the replies. When you've spent time reading it, emit action 'answer' with the topic title and what about it interested you. Don't just click the top topic — pick what fits your interests.

name: BookStack (browse docs)
notes: Public docs, browsable. Hierarchy of shelves/books/chapters.

tasks.description: You're skimming the BookStack documentation looking for something useful for someone like YOU. Browse books and pages. When you find ONE page that genuinely seems valuable to your situation, emit action 'answer' with the page title and how it's relevant.
You're shopping on Spree. Browse categories and product cards. Find ONE item you'd actually want, then emit action 'answer' with what you picked and why. Look at at least 2-3 things before deciding.

Browse Grafana Play. Find ONE dashboard that you find interesting to look at, given your background and tech literacy. Click in, look around. When you've chosen, emit action 'answer' with the dashboard name and what about it caught your eye.
